IGUI_ChuckAlertAlertButtonTooltip:
Click to See Alerts.
Right-Click to Close.
IGUI_ChuckAlertDonationMsg:
While I deeply enjoy modding, it requires significant time and energy, and I need to balance it with other responsibilities, particularly financial ones. To make it clear, I will continue to maintain, support, troubleshoot, and update my mods as I always have. However, these other priorities must come first.

This same situation can apply to almost all modders, and you may find support buttons for each respective mod listed here. These buttons are customizable and set by the mod-authors. If you’ve enjoyed any mod-author’s hardwork and dedication and would like to support it, consider doing so.

Personally, donations make it more feasible for me to dedicate time and effort to my projects. That said, there’s absolutely no pressure; please only donate if you’re comfortable and able. For me, your enjoyment of my mods is already a tremendous reward.

Thank you for your support and understanding!
IGUI_ChuckAlertTooltip_Close:
Click to Collapse.
Right-Click to completely Hide for this session.
IGUI_ChuckAlertTooltip_Open:
Click to Open.
Right-Click to completely Hide for this session.
IGUI_Confirmation_Amputate: <CENTRE> Do you really want to amputate that limb?
IGUI_ContextMenu_AddMetalPipeSilencerDes: Reduces sound radius by 50% but slightly lowers range
IGUI_ContextMenu_AddSilencerDescription: Reduces sound radius by 80% but slightly lowers range
IGUI_DL_GasCanInstallHint: This is a convenient location to store your gas cans, not a fuel tank extension.
IGUI_DL_GeneratorInstallHint: This is a convenient location to store your generator. No power will be provided around the vehicle.
IGUI_DL_InstallPartsFirst: You need to install %1 part(s) first:
IGUI_DL_UninstallPartsFirst: You need to uninstall %1 part(s) first:
IGUI_FakeBook_Open: It's not a book, it's a box!
IGUI_InfoPanel_Tuning: <CENTRE> <SIZE:medium> Vehicle modification panel <LINE> <LINE> <LEFT> <SIZE:small> Or tuning panel. Here you see a list of available recipes for modifying your vehicle.<LINE> <LINE> Normally, all available recipes are always shown in this panel, but there are also recipes that do not appear here unless you fulfil some conditions. Conditions can be: you have a skill, a certain item is available, you have reached the required character level. <LINE> <LINE> Resources in your inventory are used to create items. In addition, the character takes resources from nearby containers - including from the floor. <LINE> <LINE> At this point, parts installed through the tuning menu cannot be repaired without removal, and most parts will be disassembled into parts when removed.

IGUI_Inspect_Radio_Description_Info: Can provide news, alerts or entertainment depending on the station.
IGUI_Inspect_Radio_Description_Uses: Its effective use depends on power and signal quality.
IGUI_Inspect_Tool_Fallback: General-purpose tool with basic functional use.
IGUI_Inspect_Tool_Hybrid_Note: This tool is also suitable for close-quarters impact use.
IGUI_Inspect_Tool_Utility_Base: Tool designed for construction, repair, or general utility tasks.
IGUI_Inspect_Tool_Utility_Usage: Used to perform practical or crafting-related actions.
IGUI_Inspect_WeaponPart_Base: Weapon part or attachment used to upgrade or maintain weapons.
IGUI_Inspect_WeaponPart_Usage: Often installed on firearms or required for crafting weapon modifications.
IGUI_Inspect_WeaponUtil_Base_CookingWeap: Cooking tool adapted for close-quarters impact use.
IGUI_Inspect_WeaponUtil_Base_Explosive: Explosive device designed to deliver area damage upon detonation.
IGUI_Inspect_WeaponUtil_Base_Fallback: Improvised weapon suitable for emergency defense.
IGUI_Inspect_WeaponUtil_Base_GardeningWe: Gardening tool capable of delivering blunt or piercing strikes.
IGUI_Inspect_WeaponUtil_Base_HouseholdWe: Household item adapted for improvised defensive use.
IGUI_Inspect_WeaponUtil_Base_InstrumentW: Instrument repurposed as a blunt-impact weapon.
IGUI_Inspect_WeaponUtil_Base_WeaponPart: Weapon component intended for modification or repair.
IGUI_Inspect_WeaponUtil_Base_WritingWeap: Writing tool capable of limited puncture damage.
IGUI_LockpickFail: The lock didn't budge. I should try again.
IGUI_MiniHealth_UpdateNotes: <CENTRE> <SIZE:medium> Mini Health Panel update 1.5 <LINE> <LEFT> <SIZE:small> - Fixed the treatment option not showing for infected or scratched wounds without bleeding. <LINE> - Fixed the affected body part not blinking when bandaged with a bullet or lodged glass. <LINE> - Fixed color and blinking issues with broken bones and splints. <LINE> <LINE> The mod has also been updated to work with Build 42 Unstable.
IGUI_MismatchedPiece: This patch won't fit well. (Less XP)
IGUI_ModernStatus_BladderAccidentRule: Accident: 10%/min at 100%; panic from 80% (60% Cowardly); Brave/Desensitized block panic
IGUI_ModernStatus_BladderWakeRule: maximum level may wake the character
IGUI_ModernStatus_BundledPreset_HorizMat: Horizontal Matrix - Auto-Hide (No Nutrition) - Fill Gaps
IGUI_ModernStatus_DeadlyFumesActive: Deadly Fumes active: toxic air source detected
IGUI_ModernStatus_DoubleClickTakeBetaBlo: Take Beta Blockers or Drink Alcohol
IGUI_ModernStatus_DoubleClickTakeVitamin: Take Caffeine Pills or Drink Tea/Coffee
IGUI_ModernStatus_HygieneBadSummary: Bad Hygiene (>60%): raises Stress and Unhappiness
IGUI_ModernStatus_HygieneGoodSummary: Good Hygiene (<40%): lowers Stress and Unhappiness
IGUI_ModernStatus_HygieneRiskSummary: Strong Bad Hygiene (>80%): cold rolls if enabled; nearby bad-smell reaction possible
IGUI_ModernStatus_HygieneWashingNote: Showers/baths lower it; Wash > Yourself only removes dirt/blood and recovers bad hygiene toward 50
IGUI_ModernStatus_InvalidPresetName: Preset name cannot be blank, too long, or contain line breaks/control characters.
IGUI_ModernStatus_SmellGoodNote: Good Smell can hide Bad Hygiene visually, but penalties use real hygiene
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_AddAllToMatrix: Link all indicators to the matrix using the current All Indicators order.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_AlarmEnabled: Enable or disable the alarm animation without changing the threshold value.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_AnimationThres: Starts the alarm when an active effect has this much time left or less.
Starts the alarm when the current load reaches this percentage of carry capacity.
Starts the alarm when the value moves this far away from {target}.
Starts the alarm when this value rises above the threshold. 0 means alarm on any non-zero value.
Alarm trigger. Reserves alert when they fall below it, risks alert when they rise above it, and centered indicators use distance from targets like 37 (Temperature) or 80 (Weight).
Starts the alarm when this value reaches the threshold or higher.
Starts the alarm when this reserve falls below the threshold. 0 means alarm whenever it is not full.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_AutoHide: Hide the indicator until its value passes the Auto Hide Threshold.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_AutoHideThresh: Shows this indicator while the effect is active. If above 0, it can wait until the remaining time drops to the threshold.
Shows Encumbrance when the current load reaches this percentage of carry capacity. 0 means show only when carrying something.
Shows this indicator when the value moves this far away from {target}.
Shows this indicator when the value rises above the threshold. 0 means show on any non-zero value.
Auto-hide trigger. Reserves appear when they fall below it, risks appear when they rise above it, and centered indicators use distance from targets like 37 (Temperature) or 80 (Weight).
Shows this indicator when the value reaches the threshold or higher. 0 means show on any non-zero value.
Shows this reserve when it falls below the threshold. 0 means show whenever it is not full.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_Color: Base color used when Gradient Colors is disabled.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_Columns: Number of columns used by the matrix layout.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_DisplayThresho: Show threshold markers on the indicator.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_FillHiddenMatr: Hidden or auto-hidden matrix indicators do not reserve slots; later indicators fill the gaps while keeping order.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_Hide: Show or hide the affected indicators.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_IconOpacity: Change the opacity of the icon.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_IconPosition: Bar styles only. Unchecked = left/bottom, checked = right/top.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_InvertDirectio: Flip the displayed value direction for monotonic indicators. Good states can be shown near either 100% or 0%.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_IsVertical: Switch between horizontal and vertical bar layout.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_KeepLayoutOnRe: When enabled, releasing an indicator from the matrix keeps its current matrix layout. When disabled, it returns to its own saved layout.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_Lock: Lock or unlock movement of the affected indicators.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_MatrixLinkTogg: Toggle between single-indicator layout and matrix layout.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_Mode: Switch between circular, horizontal bar, and vertical bar styles.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_Opacity: Change the opacity of the main indicator.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_ReleaseAll: Unlink all indicators from the matrix.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_ShowName: Show the indicator name inside the bar.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_UpdateInterval: How often this indicator recalculates its value. Higher values can improve performance but make updates less immediate.
IGUI_ModernStatus_Tooltip_UseGradient: Use the indicator's special palette instead of the fixed base color.
IGUI_NeedScrewAndClip: I need a screwdriver and a paperclip.

I can't get to the engine.
I need to remove the bullbar first

to sleep in the mattress.

Not tired enough to sleep
in the mattress yet.

IGUI_StarlitLibrary_VersionTooOld:
A mod you have installed expects a newer version of Starlit Library than you have installed. Some features may not work as intended.
Steam sometimes fails to update mods - unsubscribe and resubscribe to ensure your version is up to date.
Installed version: %1
Required version: %2+

IGUI_SwimWord_Damage3: Cramp in the hand, I urgently need to go to the shore!

IGUI_SwimWord_Endurance3: Better to swim towards the shore
IGUI_SwimWord_Endurance4: I will save my strength by swimming more slowly
